name: Ben Carson
subject: I'm hopeful for America. This is why...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carson America, Inc
body:
---
| | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/29667134:28440242095:m:1:876315805:630D72026014D45B4228999D255761BF:r)
---

Peter,

1,800 people in Cedar Rapids. 2,300 in Des Moines. 1,600 in Council Bluffs.

Candy and I went straight to Iowa after last week's debate, and this is how many people were there to join us.

When I said during the debate, "I'm hopeful that I'm not the only one willing to pick up the baton of freedom, because freedom is not free and we must fight for it every day," these extraordinary crowds explain why.

**[To see for yourself, please take one minute to watch this fantastic new video.](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/29667134:28440242095:m:1:876315805:630D72026014D45B4228999D255761BF:r)**
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/29667134:28440242095:m:1:876315805:630D72026014D45B4228999D255761BF:r)
---
I'm running for President because I feel a duty to help ensure the survival of what President Lincoln once described as "government of the people, by the people, and for the people."

In addition to the thousands of people I met in Iowa this weekend, I feel blessed that you have chosen to join me in this critical endeavor -- and every day I grow more hopeful that together, we will heal and revive this great nation.

**[Thank you, and I hope you'll take a minute to watch and share our new video.](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/29667134:28440242095:m:1:876315805:630D72026014D45B4228999D255761BF:r)**

Sincerely,

Ben Carson

| | |
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/29667135:28440242095:m:1:876315805:630D72026014D45B4228999D255761BF:r) [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/29667136:28440242095:m:1:876315805:630D72026014D45B4228999D255761BF:r)
---

name: John Weaver
subject: The latest poll
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich For America, www
body:
[

](www.JohnKasich.com)
A new poll of New Hampshire voters is out today that has Gov. John Kasich in 3rd place and only 1-point behind Jeb Bush.

This news follows recent polls that have **consistently shown Gov. Kasich gaining more and more support in New Hampshire**.

**Peter,[please help us keep up the momentum!](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/29673112:28444318124:m:1:958431888:6203BE2BA5BFF3E1BB3A6AA618F6B317:r)**
[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/29673113:28444318124:m:1:958431888:6203BE2BA5BFF3E1BB3A6AA618F6B317:r)
Gov. Kasich is in New Hampshire today and tomorrow for a series of Town Hall events with voters. [With your help, we can keep gaining momentum!](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/29673112:28444318124:m:1:958431888:6203BE2BA5BFF3E1BB3A6AA618F6B317:r)
In case you missed it, Gov. Kasich was on Fox News with Sean Hannity last evening and spoke about how we can work together to restore the American dream:

[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/29673114:28444318124:m:1:958431888:6203BE2BA5BFF3E1BB3A6AA618F6B317:r)
Thanks for your support!
Sincerely,
**John Weaver
**Chief Strategist

[

name: Mandi Karp
subject: Look -- you know better
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| Last week -- thousands of Patrick's supporters signed our petition in support of Planned Parenthood and women's access to health care.

_Now, Rep. Ron DeSantis -- a Republican co-sponsor of the bill to defund Planned Parenthood -- is accusing Patrick of not speaking out in support._

**You know better.** You know Patrick has always been an advocate for women and families. You know Patrick supports Planned Parenthood and their important services like cancer screenings, prenatal care, birth control, and STI testing.

**Now, we need you to take action. [_We 're collecting an additional 5,000 signatures in the next 24 hours. Our records show that you have not yet completed the form. Click here to sign._](http://act.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2001/738133e4/3920e66a/7f95e8ad/173669559/VEsH/ "http://act.murphyforflorida.com/e150810m")** Thanks,
Mandi

Mandi Karp
Finance Director \---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Patrick Murphy <info@murphyforflorida.com>
Date: Fri, Aug 7, 2015
Subject: Petition: Stand up for Planned Parenthood
Friend,

**Florida Republicans are on a mission to destroy Planned Parenthood.** Rep. Ron DeSantis has co-sponsored a bill that would _remove funding from Planned Parenthood_ , and another one of my opponents just introduced a bill to completely _defund Planned Parenthood_. Florida Republicans are making it clear: they do not stand for women's health.

Planned Parenthood provides vital health services to women (and men) across the country. One in five women in America has visited a Planned Parenthood clinic at least once in their lives. My opponents aren't only against this organization -- their names are on the bills to strip their funding.

Here's the good news, though: Republicans aren't the only ones on a mission. We're on a mission, too -- to protect women's access to the health care they need. Today that access is in more danger than ever. We need to protect it.

[_**Demand Republicans in Congress end their attacks on Planned Parenthood and women 's health services. Sign the petition.**_](http://act.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2001/738133e4/3920e66a/7f95e8ad/173669559/VEsE/ "http://act.murphyforflorida.com/e150810m")

Planned Parenthood is already prohibited by law from using federal funds for abortion procedures. The taxpayer dollars they get are used for other services -- like cancer screenings, prenatal care, birth control, and STI testing.

So let's call this what it really is. Republicans are getting ready to vote against money for cancer screenings. They are getting ready to vote against money for prenatal care. And they're ok with it, as long as they score political points with their Tea Party base.

**Well, I 'm not ok with it. **I don't think you are either. And today, we're going to let them know that. [_**Add your name to mine and let Republicans know that you will NOT stand for this assault on women 's access to care.**_](http://act.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2001/738133e4/3920e66a/7f95e8ad/173669559/VEsF/ "http://act.murphyforflorida.com/e150810m")

I have always fought to increase women's access to reproductive health care. And that's the work I hope to bring to the United States Senate.

Thank you for joining me today.

Patrick | | | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](http://act.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2001/738133e4/3920e66a/7f95e8ae/173669559/VEsC/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/")
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://act.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2001/738133e4/3920e66a/7f95e8af/173669559/VEsD/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/unsubscribe").

Contributions or gifts to Friends of Patrick Murphy are not tax deductible.

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: There's only one right answer on Keystone XL: NO
body:
#
[**Sign my petition if you agree that we cannot move forward with Keystone XL if we 're serious about fighting climate change.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2373/43f17890/5d956b03/621d4df3/73749016/VEsH/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/keystone-XL?source=em150811su")

Dear Friend,
Climate change is an unprecedented planetary emergency. If we don't act aggressively now to combat it, there will be major and painful consequences in store later: rising oceans that inundate coastal areas, bigger superstorms like Hurricane Sandy, worsening droughts, out-of-control wildfires, historic floods that come year after year, rising food prices, and millions of people displaced by climate disasters. It's not a future any of us wants to imagine.
But despite how difficult the problem is, the basics of how we should respond to it are actually not that complicated: **we need to keep fossil fuels in the ground, and move to 100 percent renewable energy -- and we need to act immediately.**
That's why I cannot understand why some Democratic presidential candidates have refused to take a stand against the Keystone XL pipeline. Keystone XL would transport millions of gallons of some of the dirtiest oil on the planet -- oil that scientists tell us we simply cannot burn if we want to stop the worst impacts of climate change. As former NASA scientist James Hansen has said, building Keystone XL would mean "game over" for the climate.
A decision on Keystone XL could come at any moment, and that's why it's so important you make your voice heard through our campaign today:
[**Sign my petition if you agree that we cannot move forward with Keystone XL if we're serious about fighting climate change.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2373/43f17890/5d956b03/621d4df3/73749016/VEsE/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/keystone-XL?source=em150811su")
It's no big surprise that in recent years, most major Republican politicians have chosen to deny that climate change even exists. Republicans in Congress have collectively received millions of dollars in campaign contributions from fossil fuel interests who directly profit from stonewalling action on climate, at the expense of the climate and of humanity. Politicians who deny climate change is real, despite an overwhelming scientific consensus, are as morally bankrupt as those who helped Big Tobacco conceal the truth about the health effects of smoking, evading responsibility for years.
But in some ways, it's even more disappointing to see Democratic politicians, who understand that climate change is real and profess to care about action on climate, equivocate on an issue as clear-cut as Keystone XL.
A study released by the scientific journal _Nature_ just a few months ago found that if we want to keep global warming below the internationally agreed-upon safe upper limit of two degrees Celsius, we need to reduce all production of the Canadian tar sands -- the kind of oil that Keystone XL would transport -- to "negligible" levels. **In other words, there is simply no scenario where we can address climate change in a real way and also allow this pipeline to go forward.**
[**Add your name to mine if you agree that we cannot move forward with Keystone XL if we 're serious about fighting climate change.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2373/43f17890/5d956b03/621d4df3/73749016/VEsF/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/keystone-XL?source=em150811su")
Stopping the Keystone XL pipeline is not the only thing we must do to address climate change. Ultimately, we need to leave all fossil fuels in the ground and move to a 100 percent renewable energy economy.
That's why I also oppose oil drilling in the Arctic, support the fossil fuel divestment movement, and have sponsored legislation in Congress to bring solar energy to ten million rooftops in America. As a result of these positions, and my long record in support of the environment, I was recently honored to receive the endorsement of Friends of the Earth.
To win the important environmental victories we so urgently need, it will take a coordinated grassroots movement fighting to take our country and our climate back from the fossil fuel industry billionaires. It was a grassroots movement -- of Nebraska ranchers, Native American communities, and climate change activists -- that managed to hold off Keystone XL for years, despite the conventional wisdom that the pipeline was a done deal. I'm proud to have stood with those activists in their fight from the very beginning.
[**Sign my petition: we cannot move forward with Keystone XL if we 're serious about fighting climate change.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2373/43f17890/5d956b03/621d4df3/73749016/VEsC/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/keystone-XL?source=em150811su")
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders

[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2373/43f17890/5d956b03/621d4df0/73749016/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=em150811su-cc")

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2373/43f17890/5d956b03/621d4df1/73749016/VEsA/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2373/43f17890/5d956b03/621d4dfe/73749016/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2373/43f17890/5d956b03/621d4dff/73749016/VEsO/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2373/43f17890/5d956b03/621d4dfc/73749016/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

| Dear Friend,

Today, the Cruz for President campaign [released a video](http://em.tedcruz.org/wf/click?upn=oxRiKmNZf-2B-2FjHRySYBDLyx-2FfYGqyCM1A1cRZnLoHNvADEheEYkopjUftEyHuvKzB7Y-2BcsAdVQZnmoBmRF9tVrg-3D-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCGiVRX2Ezk1kiCwl-2F2KtHQYUK8-2FdY0vYqiRQ1fogJmWVpY5vqQhwSfkD2YBkWZ6Krd8kNwCoTWjBTQlF6P-2FOoUPSs1oL2fhojTPSvR9mIuM8OYLiOBGw9uNKyiMnbmGajtMcEAK2o6EM5ShDcGGlIay-2FBig1M8sKfpPkWICgJG-2BFFW8wU3Ev3L7NqssOj0CedYWM0Ibs6NGjmQP-2BAeqVu43uHnDarBDj2zCIVgnjgSZmxJTdryNZtIRS0P2q1BqxEOq9vdm0mFlXHdpjvr1SpcBs7G6ezuiQURSTCdcbkFO4MKdpLmHZvd73j8cKLELxKGwvs6uf6MlaPGmgOoZXfwlSD-2Fw4WygDhCYoX5hPq8wXIlVjlwQ03ZauHsmWN53GV8-3D) halfway through our [#CruzCountry #CruzToVictory](http://em.tedcruz.org/wf/click?upn=oxRiKmNZf-2B-2FjHRySYBDLy09v5edMMZm9mVbjZI6SnjzucCD37htHzIXcG-2BE5HuBU_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCGiVRX2Ezk1kiCwl-2F2KtHQYDob3S6CCDjh7MO6SLqZXHllTSPHQ-2Fty40h1O1cL6VUbwhoMWUv3kT-2BHUQL7-2BKcK4rLvzmB0JAx28dZbKQP-2BTOD1YoMfXwdDEwP4kBvfCNsqSqdg8IZnnDPDfTixd6VCAX60iVNYvQppFpjdOQQ-2FNAojV5z-2Bb2jzPx4CXZc-2Fw1Pjdn7WNjar5oX-2Fit-2Br6zmklm214ovWlbneb-2FRxgkvYHGYlmqKNgPApocoxMPMkfu9WnDheXTj9Xo86guAvVSdFnFvzh8GLWwnglxmq0b06BXc5yEnNwCr4esezEGE5flYRJI2iGRhpieIBG08FMC9Ve-2FzK8C6g67csF7OG8BZEwvVh4PnL5zaYNJ-2B7089A6Qus-3D) Bus Tour highlighting the overwhelming crowds turning out to see Ted throughout the Southern states -- [**and I wanted to make sure you saw it!**](http://em.tedcruz.org/wf/click?upn=TEeb5-2FMuQyoelyZpsAGcFGzZxJ-2FbsbWWg2X-2BIOsVXaDvrYkCxWN8Rp7boYDls7UOiNV1c57nr-2FUbqQR2b-2F6b4g-3D-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCGiVRX2Ezk1kiCwl-2F2KtHQY7ueIuEps0q0MYiA2RGUUL-2F3tUlIwTc1ybagxp0Xmnwmg6iOzz447K3G8mOJpwKiSrZrbmn5DqmE-2FGRU8qMPZMFg2yT1ikQy965EghgIDQIXWgYzY3SijinQ1YnUkuqeFqdS5JQfQJJh-2Fots-2FRg1QpEdGFEzFtUJvTC8fj2P6dqcUkAgUSm3tUgiR5dTI0fH4ic0eo4HowGoLMCbkMEFqCnlFd-2Fmdn3ca0JcnLkrJthlAlqY0j-2BlYMI0Mc2dAvsrpU8qjTKRkfepDSApjiijMpJJNBYBFCPuEb9SQPyFHvZE3hvK0rG10uob1k78npTbQWD7ula5mBiQ2S5TdezQpvzEAdjACUn5NGGn0jc0M-2Fiw-3D)

No event has had fewer than 500 people, _**with the largest crowd nearing the 2,000 mark**_.
**[](http://em.tedcruz.org/wf/click?upn=oxRiKmNZf-2B-2FjHRySYBDLyx-2FfYGqyCM1A1cRZnLoHNvADEheEYkopjUftEyHuvKzB7Y-2BcsAdVQZnmoBmRF9tVrg-3D-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCGiVRX2Ezk1kiCwl-2F2KtHQY6gAH9k3L651Y5ZSdeYtvcVOScxM6vtw-2FP-2FdAFIglvFHVlVvr-2FzX2o04cai1apysthHyEjTBuFUm8C3JFljnF1iLQ-2FLJS5bz6QM4SATyGQ8DHqY6F9Sabel1nqCwWxvmyXA9r1O5fIv2EbZ9vmpMPKgdrJ7WrxQNeMcn0rsXaoMMwi2CT4yJYpNvLHBZbAFZAbqo3BJwm0CGJdaA19tCo0mXESH4wJpfQdBsS6PDdwtC-2F-2BsmjTmGl8mlZXbSXf-2FtMNFaiaFk-2B9Gs6BBmw3jKf6yTyGs-2B7rHLcDFekJK-2B4YMPPfuzXZe34HLJunB4Grl1LLSNKBz00EYfRtyRUJqrc2cGLT1T-2Flc3Zevf4GDpktcA-3D)**
As of today, Ted has made multiple stops in South Carolina, Georgia, Alabama, Mississippi, and Tennessee -- **all states where he has released strong leadership teams that will continue to build his robust grassroots network in each state.**

And the [#CruzCountry #CruzToVictory](http://em.tedcruz.org/wf/click?upn=oxRiKmNZf-2B-2FjHRySYBDLy09v5edMMZm9mVbjZI6SnjzucCD37htHzIXcG-2BE5HuBU_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCGiVRX2Ezk1kiCwl-2F2KtHQYAye2DYX5-2B9T2-2Bf-2B-2BGa6mIJ1DU7ETPTLpOWp33U6aMOgHhsZLio64Oi7KUzAIUMFOiraTQSq3Mvujefbu4SlMSm0l1x3eo2ENoTyjVKxXcGzjwJ17vneFAIjzn7bMOvrlLbyUIhL-2BkiVQG67xYer1a8bZ2SPtRFjPg9ZbWbLWgD72kaH8TksEYNf8fG8SUr0iPCkhw6O2fkygyvUmFOmCrd2cbQ3aWEyIEQ02hVQOtlylTRv6iD3gNzw6Hti-2FABTLeWy-2B3uquL7XwU8-2BLS4w-2BXHw2FQvE3tCijPfD1NiEX-2FTgC-2BKrpVH4AyQa3aj7lvmnnfs04FqnYHDxxYyNQS-2BV1tMail9sF053TwYuwhzdy4s-3D) Bus Tour continues on through Arkansas and concludes in Oklahoma on Thursday, August 13. [**We hope you 'll join us!**](http://em.tedcruz.org/wf/click?upn=oxRiKmNZf-2B-2FjHRySYBDLy09v5edMMZm9mVbjZI6SnjzucCD37htHzIXcG-2BE5HuBU_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCGiVRX2Ezk1kiCwl-2F2KtHQY-2FTlW50tM7aidGSfmKI9XAjHbNsbIG2R-2B2FIVZV17EF4762dp71B2Wcsn0BMR00n-2BXkN-2FVAImpnSk08tiXlPuYfzWCFrq3Ra0xUyEoYUqfrJ1ZOp29lZJjhvZ5RZF0sqK3fMwGeqrFZ2IOdXRtENn-2Bz6Vsi2a1EwXrIHfERO90E4rXr-2Bz6q3UZptmgtSRnG4RV219X1r-2B2c0D-2BrwZ73ublOENB463Fm-2BhWxnoHfKSF1X8A-2FaYxXum8NRU76Sbg2HkhtHn4O4bbGqH7EsR12pafNITst1m0zmDUGSKECsrtsx-2BM-2FkNT2sZnxs6yuGzW7xqfrMGF9jMFOF9bsOSmBp8m2Oq3sbiy-2BptRNrE0DCOGR4-3D)

For Liberty,

Mark Campbell
National Political Director
Cruz for President.

P.S.
